description: Component multi-instance rendering (§15.13.5). The same `Badge` component is instantiated twice with distinct `label` props; each <Badge/> use-site renders its own instance carrying its own prop value. Two .badge spans: alpha, beta.
rationale: §15.13.5 a component definition is a MULTI-INSTANCE vehicle: each <Badge/> tag instantiates a fresh component with its own props. Two instances -> two .badge nodes, each rendering its own label (alpha, beta). 'If you want many of them, use a component.'
